metaTitle: Squirrel Removal NYC | Squirrel Exclusion | The Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Licensed squirrel removal and exclusion in NYC. Humane trapping. Structural exclusion to prevent re-entry. NYS DEC certified. Call now.
h1: Squirrel Removal in NYC — Out of Your Home, Permanently
heroParagraph: Squirrels seem harmless from the street, but inside your walls or attic they're a serious problem. They gnaw continuously — through wood, insulation, and electrical wiring — and a single entry point becomes a family by spring. Our squirrel removal program combines humane exclusion trapping with structural sealing to remove the current occupants and permanently close every entry point against future ones.
